title: ROCode Autoresearch Workflow Configuration
description: Extends the scheduler profile with autoresearch-specific workflow fields. These fields sit alongside the standard profile properties (orchestrator, stages, agentTree, etc.) and define the objective-driven iteration contract that the scheduler profile alone cannot express.

workflowDescriptor.description: Identifies the workflow kind and mode. Determines which domain-specific config blocks are required and which runtime controllers are activated.

kind.description: Workflow family. Fixed to 'autoresearch' for this schema.

mode.description: Workflow mode. Each mode activates different runtime controllers, stop conditions, artifacts, and gate logic.

objectiveDefinition.description: The thing being optimized. Defines goal, scope, metric extraction, verification command, and optional guard command. This is the control contract for the iteration loop.

goal.description: Human-readable objective statement. Used for prompt context and run summaries, not for machine evaluation.

direction.description: Whether the metric should increase or decrease to indicate improvement.

verify.description: Command that produces the metric output. Runs after every iteration. Its stdout is fed to the metric parser.

guard.description: Optional regression check. Runs after verify passes. Pass/fail only (exit code 0 = pass). Guard failure triggers rework, not discard.

satisfiedWhen.description: Optional threshold that defines when the objective is fully met. Triggers StopSatisfied.

metricAtLeast.description: For higher-is-better: stop when metric >= this value.

metricAtMost.description: For lower-is-better: stop when metric <= this value.

metricEquals.description: Stop when metric exactly equals this value.

scopeDefinition.description: File scope boundaries. The agent is allowed to modify files matching 'include' globs, except those matching 'exclude' globs.

include.description: Glob patterns for files in scope.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files excluded from mutation. Guard and test files should go here.

metricDefinition.description: How to extract a numeric value from the verify command's output.

kind.description: Metric extraction strategy. 'numeric-extract' uses a regex to capture a number. 'count-lines' counts output lines matching a pattern. 'exit-code' treats 0 as 1.0 and non-zero as 0.0. 'json-path' extracts a numeric field from JSON output.

pattern.description: Regex with a capture group for the numeric value. Required when kind is 'numeric-extract'.

countPattern.description: Pattern to count matching lines. Required when kind is 'count-lines'.

jsonPath.description: JSON path expression for numeric field extraction. Required when kind is 'json-path'.

unit.description: Human-readable unit label for display purposes (e.g. 'percent', 'ms', 'errors').

commandDefinition.description: A shell command with execution constraints.

command.description: Shell command string. Executed via the platform shell.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds. Command is killed if exceeded. Default: 300000 (5 minutes).

env.description: Additional environment variables for this command.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory for command execution. Defaults to the repository root.

iterationPolicyDefinition.description: Controls the outer iteration loop: how many iterations, when to stop, when to escalate. This is distinct from the scheduler's loopBudget, which caps model turns within a single stage.

mode.description: 'bounded' runs exactly maxIterations times. 'unbounded' runs until a stop condition fires or manual interruption.

maxIterations.description: Required when mode is 'bounded'. Ignored when mode is 'unbounded'.

stopConditions.description: Conditions that trigger an early stop. Evaluated after every iteration decision.

stuckThreshold.description: Number of consecutive discards before triggering the stuck protocol (re-read all files, try radical changes). Default: 5.

progressReportEvery.description: Emit a one-line progress summary every N iterations. Default: 5.

decisionPolicyDefinition.description: Rules for the keep/discard/rework/crash-retry decision after each iteration. These rules are evaluated mechanically by the DecisionPolicy service, not by model inference.

baselineStrategy.description: How to establish the baseline metric value.

baselineValue.description: Explicit baseline value. Required when baselineStrategy is 'from-config'.

keepConditions.description: All conditions must hold for a Keep decision.

discardConditions.description: Any condition triggers a Discard decision.

reworkPolicy.description: Controls rework attempts when metric improved but guard failed.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum rework attempts per iteration. 0 disables rework (guard failure = discard).

crashRetryPolicy.description: Controls crash recovery attempts when an iteration produces a runtime error.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum crash recovery attempts per iteration. 0 disables crash retry.

simplicityOverride.description: Override for marginal improvements that add disproportionate complexity.

minImprovementPercent.description: Improvements below this threshold are treated as Discard if they add complexity.

workspacePolicyDefinition.description: Mutation boundaries and revert strategy. Defines how the runtime manages workspace state across iterations.

mutationMode.description: 'tracked' requires all mutations to be captured in snapshots. 'untracked' allows mutations outside snapshot scope (use with caution).

protectedPaths.description: Glob patterns for files that must never be modified. Guard files, golden test data, vendor directories. Violations are hard errors.

snapshotStrategy.description: How to capture and restore workspace state. Each strategy has different trade-offs for speed, isolation, and recoverability. See AUTORESEARCH_RUNTIME.md for details.

commitPolicy.description: Controls whether and how iterations are committed.

commitKeptIterations.description: Create a git commit for iterations with Keep decisions.

squashOnCompletion.description: Squash all kept iteration commits into one on run completion.

artifactDefinition.description: Where and how run artifacts are persisted. Artifacts are the authoritative record of what happened.

rootDir.description: Root directory for all autoresearch artifacts.

approvalPolicyDefinition.description: Controls which side-effect actions require human approval. Relevant for ship and fix modes where actions cross the boundary from repository edits to external effects.

requireHumanApprovalFor.description: Actions that must be explicitly approved by the operator.

allowAutoApproveWhen.description: Conditions under which auto-approval is permitted.

securityConfig.description: Security audit configuration. Required when mode is 'security'.

failOnSeverity.description: Minimum severity that constitutes a blocking finding.

diffMode.description: When true, only audit changed files (delta audit). When false, full-repo audit.

autoFix.description: When true, attempt to fix findings automatically (transitions to fix mode internally).

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence fields required for each finding. Findings without required evidence are rejected at the gate.

debugConfig.description: Scientific-method debugging configuration. Required when mode is 'debug'.

symptom.description: Observable failure description. Starting point for hypothesis generation.

reproCommand.description: Optional command that reproduces the failure. Used to verify hypotheses mechanically.

minSeverity.description: Minimum severity for accepting a root cause finding.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence required before a root cause is accepted.

maxHypotheses.description: Maximum hypotheses to track before forcing convergence.

fixConfig.description: Error-crushing configuration. Required objective and decisionPolicy define the iteration loop; this block adds fix-specific controls.

target.description: 'auto-detect' scans for broken state across all categories. 'explicit' uses only the listed categories.

categories.description: Error categories to fix, in priority order.

fromDebug.description: When true, initializes from a debug run's findings. Requires a reference to the debug run's artifact directory.

debugRunRef.description: Path to the debug run's artifact directory. Required when fromDebug is true.

stopOnZero.description: Stop when all errors in targeted categories reach zero.

shipConfig.description: Shipping workflow configuration. Required when mode is 'ship'.

type.description: Kind of shipment. Determines which checklist template and dry-run strategy to use.

dryRun.description: When true, run the full shipping flow in dry-run mode before executing for real.

autoApprove.description: When true and approvalPolicy allows it, skip human approval for ship actions. Dangerous; use only in CI.

rollbackEnabled.description: Whether automated rollback is available if post-ship verification fails.

monitorDurationMs.description: Duration to monitor after shipping (milliseconds). 0 disables post-ship monitoring.

monitorCommand.description: Command to run during post-ship monitoring. Exit code 0 = healthy.
